title: AREA AGENCY ON AGING - 211info
text: COUNCIL ON AGING OF CENTRAL OREGON AREA AGENCY ON AGING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Area Agencies on Aging (AAA) provide a range of services to help older adults live safe, healthy, and independent lives. 1036 NE 5th Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Age 60 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 678-5483 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 678-5483 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties and City of Gilchrist, and unincorporated area of Crescent (Klamath County only) SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Services: Area Agencies on Aging Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - PET PALS FOOD - MEALS ON WHEELS HOME-DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CARING CONNECTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COUNCIL ON AGING OF CENTRAL OREGON
